ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.name: Alarm policy name
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.target.type: Target type; options: `ALL_SERVICES` - all services, `SERVICE_TAGS` - service tags, `SERVICES` - service instances
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.target.services: If type=SERVICES, specify list of target service names
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.metricKind: Metric category; options: SERVER - server-side performance, CLIENT - client-side performance, DB - database metrics, PRODUCER - producer, CONSUMER - consumer, INTERNAL_FUNCTION - internal function, JVM - JVM monitoring, EXCEPTION - exception monitoring
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.rule.operator: Logical operator; options: `and` - AND, `or` - OR. Required when used as a logical combination node
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.rule.rules: Sub-rule list; required when operator is and/or
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.rule.metric: Metric name; required when used as a leaf node (metric expression)
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.rule.aggregate: Aggregation method; options: `avg` - average, `max` - maximum, `min` - minimum, `sum` - sum, `p90` - 90th percentile, `p95` - 95th percentile, `p99` - 99th percentile, `count_per_second` - count per second
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.filters.operator: Filter operation; options: `eq` - equals, `ne` - not equals, `contains` - contains, `not_contain` - not contains, `re_match` - regex match, `re_not_match` - regex not match, `iterate` - iterate
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.filters.values: Dimension value list; if `*` is included, iterates all values of that dimension
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.pendingCount: Consecutive trigger threshold; number of consecutive threshold breaches before alerting
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.renotifyIntervalInMinutes: Repeat alarm interval in minutes; set to 0 to disable repeat alarms
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.renotifyCount: Maximum repeat count; set to 0 to disable repeat alarms
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.onMissingData: Missing data handling; options: SHOW_NO_DATA_AND_NOTIFY - show no data and send alarm, SHOW_NO_DATA - show no data without alarm, SHOW_OK - resolve alarm, EVALUATE_AS_ZERO - treat missing data as 0 and compare against threshold
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.noDataNotifyPendingIntervalInMinutes: No-data alarm wait interval in minutes; required when onMissingData is SHOW_NO_DATA_AND_NOTIFY; set to 0 to trigger immediately
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.level: Alarm severity; default CRITICAL; options: NOTICE - notice, WARNING - warning, MAJOR - major, CRITICAL - critical
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.actions: Notification template list, used for anomaly, recovery, and repeat alarm notifications
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.actions.alias: Notification template name; returned in query responses only
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.actions.callBacks: Callback URL list; returned in query responses only
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.actions.disableTimes: Suppression time list; returned in query responses only
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.actions.members: Member list; returned in query responses only
ApmUpdateAlarmPolicy.actions.types: Notification type list (e.g. EMAIL); returned in query responses only
